title: Agentgateway — Access logs (ClickHouse)

targets.rawSql: SELECT LogAttributes['org'] AS org, LogAttributes['user_email'] AS user_email, count() AS requests FROM otel.otel_logs GROUP BY org, user_email ORDER BY requests DESC
SELECT Timestamp, LogAttributes['org'] AS org, LogAttributes['user_email'] AS user_email, LogAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] AS model, Body FROM otel.otel_logs ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

__comment: Attributes set by the telemetry AgentgatewayPolicy land in the LogAttributes Map(String,String) column. user_email + org are custom; gen_ai.request.model is emitted by agentgateway. Queries verified against the otel.otel_logs table the ClickHouse exporter auto-creates.
